title: bidens leptocephala
intro: Bidens leptocephala, also known as Beggarticks or Poor Man's Hay, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, and its leaves and stems can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions. Additionally, the plant's leaves and flowers can also be used to make a tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
